name: Willem van der Vorm
description:
Willem van der Vorm is the CEO of a large, diversified company operating across various sectors. The company is involved in import and export, gastronomy, winemaking, as well as the development of pesticides and biotechnological products for industries such as agriculture, cosmetics, and medicine.

Willem became the CEO after his father, who had also inherited the company from his own father. However, this does not mean that Willem did not contribute to the business. He took over the company at the age of 23, when his father fell seriously ill, and despite his young age, he managed to achieve significant success in the family business.

He is now 38 years old. Willem is a tall and well-built man who, in addition to his work, devotes a lot of time to his health and regularly exercises.

He is tall, 193 cm. His eyes are a gray-blue shade. His gaze is sharp and stern. His hair is golden, shimmering gold or platinum.
creator: imists
